title: Inverted Contrast
summary: Bodoni Moda opsz 72 hairlines on jet black. The saved-sites pane is a column of titles whose high-contrast cut is the entire visual. A 1px-faint tabular suffix carries size.
darkAccent: bone-warm #E8DEC2 — saving pill, active title, active rail letter, identity tint. Tonal lift rather than chromatic accent. Single accent.
typeface: Bodoni Moda variable (opsz 6–96, ital, wght 400–700) for all display copy — titles, dock letters, eyebrows, settings values, button labels, datelines + Manrope 300–600 for body copy, tabular figures (tnum/lnum), file names, log messages.
railTreatment: five Bodoni Moda hairline capitals — S · M · B · D · L — set at 26px opsz 14, vertically centred. Each silhouette is unmistakably different by virtue of the letterform itself; the active letter shifts to bone-warm and gains a 3px dot beneath.
listPattern: inverted-contrast titles — each entry is a single line set in Bodoni Moda opsz 72 at 36px on near-black. The hairline-thick-thin contrast is the entire visual. A 1px-faint Manrope tabular suffix on the right carries size in tabular numerals. No meta-line, no per-row icon. Active entry is italicized and shifts to bone-warm.
